_publications._publicationTitle: Fibroblasts Attenuate Anti-Tumor Drug Efficacy in Tumor Cells via Paracrine Interactions with Tumor Cells in 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Cultures

_contextSnippet: 3D pNF1 structures in parallel cocultures with fibroblasts exhibited greater drug resistance than monocultures to selumetinib and mirdametinib; fibroblasts showed higher intrinsic resistance to both drugs than pNF1 tumor structures
details: Using TAME linked-well configuration, 3D pNF1 tumor structures cocultured with fibroblasts showed greater resistance to selumetinib and mirdametinib than pNF1 monocultures; fibroblasts themselves were more resistant to both MEK inhibitors than pNF1 cells, suggesting the fibroblast secretome drives paracrine drug resistance in pNF1 tumors
